name: OpenWeather
config_template:
# API key from https://openweathermap.org (free tier ok)
# Format: API_KEY=...
# Format: CITY=Amsterdam,NL
API_KEY=PUT_YOUR_KEY_HERE
CITY=Amsterdam,NL
description: Polls openweathermap.org every 10 minutes; publishes current temp + humidity + short description. Demonstrates an API-driven integration with a config file containing the API key.
